description: Legal deed. Opening lines only; abandoned mid-way through the fifth line. Dated: Sunday, 1 Sivan 1539 Seleucid, which is 1228 CE, under the jurisdiction of Avraham Maimonides. Parties: Avraham b. Shela and Muvḥar b. Tiqva both known as sons of Misbāḥ. On verso there are a few lines in Judaeo-Arabic, possibly hijāʾ (invective) poetry: yā jāhil bālī wa-yā khabīth al-ṭawiyya kam.... Underneath there are a couple words in Arabic script together with Greek/Coptic numerals. AA. ASE.
description_he: שטר משפטי; שורות פתיחה בלבד; תאריך: יום ראשון, א' סיון 1539 לשטרות = 1228 לספירה; תחת שיפוט אברהם הרמב'ם; הצדדים: אברהם בן שלה ומובחר בן תקוה
